name: Fire Kissed

entries: Forged in flames blessed by an {@creature Efreeti}, a Flame Kissed sword erupts in flame when it's blade makes an hostile contact with a creature causing an addition {@dice 1d6} fire damage.
Forged in flames blessed by an {@creature Efreeti}, a Flame Kissed sword erupts in flame when it's blade makes an hostile contact with a creature causing an addition {@dice 1d6} fire damage.

entries.name: Special
entries: If you attack with a double-bladed scimitar as part of the {@action Attack} action on your turn, you can use a bonus action immediately after to make a melee attack with it. This attack deals {@damage 1d4} slashing damage on a hit, instead of {@damage 2d4}.
